description: Three to five magical golden capy-energy orbs continuously orbit the player, dealing contact damage to enemies. Orbs feel warm, playful, and powerful with bright golden trails and sparkling particles.

godot_notes.rotation_method: Continuous orbital movement via rotating parent node

spawn.description: Orbs materialize from golden light around the player before expanding into orbit.

frames.visual: Tiny golden spark appears near player center.
Spark rapidly expands into glowing golden sphere core.
Thin circular magic ring flashes around orb.
Orb reaches full size, glow intensifies.
Orb smoothly accelerates into orbit path.

idle_orbit.description: Orbs continuously circle around the player while gently bobbing and pulsing.

impact.description: Quick golden burst when orb damages an enemy. Orb remains alive and continues orbiting afterward.

frames.visual: Sharp golden flash at collision point.
Circular burst of golden shards and sparkles.
Particles fade while orb resumes normal orbit.

charge_aim.description: A small yellow electric orb charges near the player, briefly aiming toward the nearest enemy.
visuals: Tiny yellow sparks gather at casting point
Thin electric line flickers toward target direction
Charge orb flashes white-yellow before release

fire.description: Bolt snaps forward instantly with a sharp electric flash.
visuals: Bolt core appears as jagged lightning spear

travel.description: Jagged lightning bolt travels quickly toward the target with crackling side arcs.

impact.description: Bolt bursts into a small electrical explosion on enemy contact.
visuals: Sparks fade into tiny golden particles

impact.sound: Bright electric pop with small thunder crack

godot_implementation.targeting: Select nearest enemy at cast start; allow slight homing during travel

spawn_launch.description: A cyan crystal orb forms from cold mist, then launches forward.
visuals: Crystal core forms with sharp icy facets
Orb launches with short frost burst

visuals.orb: Cyan crystalline sphere with rotating ice facets
visuals.trail: Soft frost trail fading behind projectile

freeze_zone.description: Creates a circular icy area on impact that slows enemies.

visuals.ground_effect: Circular frozen patch with cracked ice texture
visuals.center: Soft icy shimmer with mist rising

slow_effect_on_enemy.description: Enemies inside the freeze zone show a frosty slow visual.
visuals: Thin ice outline appears around enemy

impact.description: Orb shatters into icy fragments and expands into freeze zone.
visuals: Cold mist expands in a circle

godot_implementation.blend_mode: Additive for glow, Alpha blend for mist
godot_implementation.damage_timing: Apply projectile damage on impact frame 1

activation.description: Mud bursts outward from the player and forms a circular damaging aura.
visuals: Small brown ripple appears under player
Outer edge becomes thick and readable

idle.description: Persistent mud circle rotates slowly around the player with organic bubbling motion.

visuals.center: Thin muddy haze around player feet
visuals.motion: Organic wobble, like thick wet mud moving slowly

damage_pulse.description: Aura flashes and splashes upward whenever damage ticks.
visuals: Ripple fades back into idle aura

deactivation.description: Mud aura collapses inward and sinks back into the ground.

activation.sound: Soft earthy rumble with wet mud swell

recommended_nodes: Sprite2D or AnimatedSprite2D for aura ring
GPUParticles2D for dust and mud splash
godot_implementation.damage_timing: Apply damage every 0.75 seconds while enemy is inside Area2D

description: The capybara unleashes a magical squeal that generates a large expanding purple shockwave. The wave travels outward from the player, damaging and slightly knocking back all enemies it touches.

charge.description: Magical sonic energy gathers around the player before release.
visuals: Small purple energy ring forms beneath player

release.description: Shockwave spawns instantly at player center.
visuals: Spark burst shoots outward in all directions

expansion.description: Wave expands outward at a constant speed, maintaining readability while slowly thinning.

visuals.secondary_ring: Faint translucent purple ripple behind main ring
visuals.distortion: Subtle refractive shimmer around expanding perimeter

enemy_hit.description: Enemy reacts when struck by the wave.

dissipation.description: Outer ring loses energy and dissolves into sparkles.

charge.sound: Soft magical hum rising in pitch

godot_implementation.damage_application: Apply damage once when enemy intersects expanding ring
godot_implementation.wave_scaling_method: Scale circular sprite from radius 24px to 520px over 1.2 seconds
godot_implementation.z_index: Above ground effects, below damage numbers

heal_tick.description: A soft pink healing pulse appears around the player whenever HP regeneration triggers.
visuals: Small rose-pink glow appears at player center
Tiny heart particles spawn around body

particle_spawn.description: Small heart and sparkle particles appear near the player.

particle_travel.description: Healing particles float gently upward and fade out.

hp_gain_feedback.description: Small healing number or HP bar pulse confirms regeneration.

idle_healing_aura.description: Very subtle rose glow around the player while the passive is active.

recommended_nodes: Label or Control node for heal number popup
godot_implementation.blend_mode: Additive for glow, Alpha blend for hearts
godot_implementation.z_index: Above player for hearts, below player for aura
godot_implementation.trigger_logic: Play heal_tick animation every 0.5 seconds when regeneration applies

idle_field.description: A subtle teal attraction field breathes around the player.
visuals: Soft teal circular aura around player
Two faint concentric rings pulse outward
Thin magnetic lines gently rotate clockwise
Tiny green particles drift slowly inward

activation_expand.trigger: When XP orb enters magnet detection radius
activation_expand.description: Field expands and brightens when XP orbs are detected.
visuals: Magnetic lines sharpen toward XP orb direction
Small teal sparkle burst appears around player

attraction.description: XP orbs curve smoothly toward the player along magnetic paths.

visuals.pull_lines: Thin curved magnetic lines from orb to player
visuals.center_glow: Player center glows brighter as orbs approach

orb_collect.description: Small teal pop when XP orb reaches player.
visuals: Small sparkle burst at player center

recommended_nodes: Area2D with CircleShape2D for detection radius
Sprite2D or Line2D for aura rings
Curve2D or Tween for orb pull path
godot_implementation.blend_mode: Additive for teal glow, Alpha blend for rings
godot_implementation.z_index: Below player but above ground effects
godot_implementation.logic: When XP orb enters Area2D, tween or accelerate it toward player center using curved steering behavior.

spawn_ignition.description: Fireballs ignite near the player before entering orbit.
visuals: Spark expands into hot glowing core

visuals.trail: Short curved flame streak following orbit path

flame_flicker.description: Flames dance and change shape while orbiting.

impact_explosion.description: Fireball detonates on enemy contact, then respawns into orbit after cooldown.

orbit_to_impact_transition.description: Fireball briefly brightens and stretches toward the enemy before exploding.
visuals: Fireball scales to 1.15 and turns brighter
Trail snaps forward into impact flash

recommended_nodes: Line2D or Trail2D for flame trail
godot_implementation.blend_mode: Additive for fire glow, Alpha blend for smoke
godot_implementation.damage_timing: Apply damage on first impact_explosion frame
godot_implementation.respawn_logic: After impact, hide projectile for 0.25s, then replay spawn_ignition and return to orbit

charge.description: Electric energy builds around the player before discharge.
visuals: Small yellow sparks gather at player center
Blue arcs flicker around the player
Glow intensifies from dim yellow to white-yellow
Ground ring forms with jagged electric edges

release.description: A sudden electrical burst erupts from the player.
visuals: Small circular shock ring appears instantly

expansion.description: Jagged electric ring expands outward, damaging enemies it touches.

visuals.secondary_ring: Thin blue arc ring trailing behind
visuals.glow: Strong yellow aura fading behind wave

crackling.description: Branching blue arcs jump along the expanding ring.
visuals: Short blue branches jump between points on the ring
Small yellow sparks pop off the wave front
Heat shimmer trails behind the pulse

enemy_hit.description: Enemy briefly flashes with electrical stun feedback.
visuals: Tiny blue arcs crawl over enemy body
Small spark burst at contact point
Enemy returns to normal with fading afterglow

dissipation.description: Shockwave loses energy and breaks into lingering sparks.

gameplay_timing.damage_application: Apply damage once per enemy when expanding ring intersects enemy collision area

godot_implementation.blend_mode: Additive for electric glow and sparks
godot_implementation.z_index: Above ground effects, below UI and damage numbers
godot_implementation.implementation_note: Animate CircleShape2D radius from 28px to 500px over 1.0s. Use a second smaller radius or hit cache to ensure enemies are hit only when the wave front reaches them, not simply anywhere inside the final circle.

activation.description: Wind begins forming around the player and quickly builds into a circular cyclone.
visuals: Small pale-blue wind curl appears under player
Dust and leaf debris lift upward
Outer wind ring expands to full radius
Wind streaks stretch into a circular aura

visuals.inner_spiral: Fast pale-blue spiral wind around player feet
visuals.debris: Tiny leaves, dust, and light stones caught in airflow

speed_variation.description: Hurricane intensity breathes over time, alternating between calm spin and stronger cyclone burst.

particle_swirl.description: Wind particles spiral outward from the player, then curve back into the hurricane ring.

enemy_knockback.description: Enemies hit by the hurricane are pushed outward with wind streaks.
visuals: Curved wind slash appears at contact point
Small dust burst appears behind enemy

dissipation.description: Cyclone slows down, breaks apart, and fades into soft wind particles.
visuals: Spiral lines break into loose particles

godot_implementation.blend_mode: Additive for wind glow, Alpha blend for debris
godot_implementation.z_index: Below player body but above ground effects
godot_implementation.damage_logic: Apply damage every 0.5 seconds to enemies inside Area2D and apply outward knockback vector from player center.

charge.description: Ominous icy magic gathers before the screen-wide storm erupts.
visuals: Pale cyan glow forms around player
Crystalline magic circle flashes under player

release.description: A sudden icy burst fills the entire screen.
visuals: Heavy snow rushes outward from player
First icicle shards snap into view

peak_blizzard.description: Maximum storm intensity. Snow, mist, and ice shards dominate the screen.

visuals.ice_shards: periodic crystal spikes forming near enemies

snowflake_motion.description: Large and small snowflakes fall diagonally at different speeds.

icicle_formation.description: Sharp ice shards form periodically during peak blizzard.
visuals: Small frost circle appears on ground
Shard cracks and bursts into frost

freezing_effect_on_enemies.description: Enemies show clear slow and freezing feedback.
visuals: Thin ice outline forms around body

dissipation.description: Storm fades as snow settles and frost melts away.

screen_freeze_effect.effect: brief white-cyan freeze flash before peak storm

release.sound: Sudden icy burst with deep whoosh

peak_loop.sound: Howling blizzard wind with ice crackles

dissipation.sound: Wind fading with soft falling snow

recommended_nodes: ColorRect for screen flash and tint
Area2D or global enemy query for damage ticks
godot_implementation.blend_mode: Additive for ice glow, Alpha blend for snow and mist
godot_implementation.damage_logic: During peak_blizzard, apply damage every 0.25 seconds to all enemies on screen and refresh slow effect.
godot_implementation.performance_note: Use 3 pooled particle emitters for snow layers instead of spawning individual snowflake nodes.

draw.description: Archer briefly nocks and draws an arrow before auto-firing.
visuals: Bowstring pulls back with arrow glow

fire.description: Arrow launches sharply toward nearest enemy.
visuals: Short green muzzle-like streak from bow

visuals.arrow: Slim wooden arrow with forest-green glowing tip
visuals.trail: Thin fading green line behind arrow
visuals.wind_streaks: Small pale-green speed lines beside arrow

trail.description: Arrow leaves a clean fading path line.

impact_pierce.description: Arrow pierces through enemy with a sharp green slash flash.
visuals: Small green hit spark at entry point
Arrow exits with brief speed streak

penetration.description: Arrow continues through multiple enemies without stopping.
visuals: Arrow briefly brightens after each pierce

godot_implementation.blend_mode: Additive for glow, Alpha blend for trail
godot_implementation.damage_logic: Arrow travels in a straight line toward target direction selected at fire time. Keep a hit_cache array so each enemy is damaged once per arrow while piercing.

fire.description: Multiple arrows launch from the player center with a bright lime-green flash.

fan_spread.description: Arrows quickly separate into a clean fan pattern.
visuals: Lime light rays briefly show the spread direction

travel.description: Each arrow moves independently at the same speed after fan separation.

rotation.description: Arrows subtly spin while staying visually aligned to their travel direction.

trail.description: Each arrow leaves its own fading lime-green trail.

impact.description: Each arrow creates a small individual lime impact burst on enemy hit.
visuals: Small lime flash at contact point

recommended_nodes: GPUParticles2D per arrow or pooled particles
godot_implementation.blend_mode: Additive for lime glow, Alpha blend for trails
godot_implementation.spawn_logic: Spawn arrows at player center, distribute directions evenly across spread_angle_degrees, then move each arrow independently using its normalized direction vector.
godot_implementation.damage_logic: Each arrow damages the first enemy it hits unless upgraded with pierce.

charge.description: Arrow briefly gathers teal energy before firing.
visuals: Cyan aura wraps around arrow shaft

fire.description: Arrow launches with a sharp cyan energy burst.
visuals: Bright cyan flash at release point
Compressed teal energy ring snaps forward

visuals.arrow: Heavy arrow with teal glowing head and cyan-lit edges
visuals.aura: Constant cyan energy shell around arrow
visuals.trail: Thick teal beam-like trail fading behind arrow

glow_intensity.description: Arrow maintains strong energy glow throughout flight.

pierce.description: Special effect when arrow passes through an enemy without stopping.
visuals: Thin teal slash line appears through enemy body
Small energy ring opens at exit point

sparkle_trail.description: Sparkling cyan particles shed from the arrow trail.

penetration_visual.description: Arrow continues forward after each hit, slightly brightening to show unstoppable piercing power.

fire.sound: Heavy bow release with cyan energy snap

gameplay_timing.damage_rule: Damage each enemy once per arrow using hit_cache

godot_implementation.damage_logic: Do not destroy arrow on hit. Store enemy instance IDs in hit_cache so the same arrow does not damage the same enemy multiple times.

appear.description: Dark green magic clouds form at the top of the screen as arrows begin spawning.
visuals: Top screen edge darkens with green wind glow
First wave of arrows enters screen

rain.description: Continuous arrows rain down across the entire screen at varied angles and speeds.

impact.description: Each arrow creates a quick ground hit effect when it lands.

ground_effect.description: Temporary landing markers appear where arrows hit.

visuals.marker: Small cracked ground mark with green glow

dissipation.description: Arrow rain slows, remaining trails fade, and green wind glow disappears.
visuals: Arrow spawn rate drops to zero

appear.sound: Rising forest wind and bowstring tension

impact.sound: Rapid soft arrow impacts on ground

dissipation.sound: Wind fading with final arrow drops

godot_implementation.blend_mode: Additive for green trails, Alpha blend for arrows and dust
godot_implementation.spawn_logic: Spawn arrows above the visible screen using randomized x position, fall angle, speed, scale, and delay.
godot_implementation.performance_note: Use object pooling for arrows and impact effects to avoid creating 120+ nodes during the ultimate.

launch.description: A star-shaped knife flashes into existence and immediately begins spinning.
visuals: Star knife snaps forward with first spin blur

rotation.description: Star knife spins rapidly throughout flight.

visuals.blade: Purple-gray metallic star blade with sharp edges
visuals.shine: Small white highlight flickers across rotating blade

trail.description: A purple-gray sparkle trail follows the spinning blade.

impact.description: Blade creates a sharp metallic burst and bounces slightly on hit.
visuals: Metallic spark burst at contact point

impact.sound: Sharp metal hit with violet spark

recommended_nodes: Sprite2D or AnimatedSprite2D for star knife
godot_implementation.blend_mode: Additive for purple glow, Alpha blend for metallic sprite
godot_implementation.damage_logic: Apply damage on contact. If bounce is enabled, reflect projectile velocity using collision normal and continue travel with reduced speed.

activation.description: Knives appear one by one around the player and accelerate into a circular vortex.
visuals: Lavender danger ring flashes under player
First blade silhouette appears at orbit edge

rotation.description: Fast continuous circular rotation around the player.

blade_motion.description: Individual blades remain readable while rotating in formation.

visuals.blade_shape: Curved dagger silhouettes with lavender metal shine
visuals.orientation: Blade tips face tangent direction of orbit

spark_generation.description: Sharp sparks constantly fly outward from the spinning blades.

velocity_lines.description: Thin curved motion lines show the speed of the blade vortex.

damage_burst.description: Blade storm spikes in intensity when damaging nearby enemies.
visuals: Blade silhouettes stretch into sharp arcs
Purple slash marks appear around enemies

deactivation.description: Blades slow down, fade, and vanish into purple sparks.
visuals: Individual blades fade one by one

activation.sound: Rapid knife unsheathing with lavender magic swell

deactivation.sound: Blades slowing down and fading into sparks

recommended_nodes: Sprite2D or AnimatedSprite2D for each blade
godot_implementation.blend_mode: Additive for lavender glow and streaks, Alpha blend for blade sprites
godot_implementation.z_index: Above player weapon effects, below UI
godot_implementation.damage_logic: Apply damage every 0.45 seconds to enemies inside Area2D. Play damage_burst animation whenever at least one enemy is hit.

launch.description: Star boomerang appears beside the player with a sharp golden glow.
visuals: Metallic star expands to full size
Star begins spinning with bright edge highlight

visuals.sparkles: Small metallic sparks shed from blade tips

arc_peak.description: Star pauses briefly at the furthest point before snapping back.
visuals: Star hovers and spins in place

visuals.motion: Star curves back to player like a magnetized blade

return_trail.description: Golden sparkles follow the returning star and fade quickly.

impact.description: Enemy can be hit twice: once on outbound path and once on return path.

catch.description: When the star returns to the player, it collapses into a small golden glow.

recommended_nodes: Sprite2D or AnimatedSprite2D for boomerang star
godot_implementation.blend_mode: Additive for glow and trail, Alpha blend for metallic sprite
godot_implementation.movement_logic: Use Curve2D or quadratic Bezier paths for outbound and return arcs. Use separate hit caches for outbound and return so enemies can be damaged twice.
godot_implementation.catch_logic: When projectile reaches player return radius, play catch animation and despawn or reset for next cast.

visuals: Screen darkens with deep red vignette
Thin crimson lines briefly preview slash paths

slash_combo.description: Seven diagonal slashes cut across the screen in rapid sequence.

per_slash_animation.visual: Dark red blade line expands instantly across screen, glows crimson, then fades into trailing energy.

shockwave.description: Crimson rings burst from slash intersection points after the combo lands.

slash_sequence.sound: Seven sharp blade cuts, staggered rapidly

finale.sound: Deep final slash sting with echo

gameplay_timing.damage_application: Apply massive damage once per slash to enemies intersecting each slash line. Final slash may apply bonus damage.

recommended_nodes: Line2D or Polygon2D for slash shapes
ColorRect for darkness and flash overlay
godot_implementation.blend_mode: Additive for crimson energy, Alpha blend for darkness overlay
godot_implementation.damage_logic: Use slash line segment collision or screen-wide rectangular hitboxes rotated to slash angles. Trigger each slash hitbox at its start_time_seconds for 0.15s.

charge.description: Tangerine energy gathers around the player and begins spinning faster.
visuals: Small orange glow forms under player
Final compressed energy pulse before release

release.description: A massive tangerine vortex suddenly opens across the screen.
visuals: Large spiral instantly expands from player
Enemies are visually pulled then pushed outward

vortex.description: Full-screen swirling energy cyclone deals continuous devastating damage.

visuals.main_spiral: Thick tangerine-orange magical spiral covering the battlefield
visuals.secondary_rings: Golden-orange concentric circles rotating inward and outward
visuals.edge_effect: Warm orange energy haze at screen edges

peak_damage.description: Maximum intensity phase with brightest glow and highest damage readability.
visuals: Screen briefly trembles during damage ticks

spiral_motion.description: Concentric circles rotate inward, collapse toward center, then burst outward.

enemy_knockback.description: Enemies are pushed away from the vortex center.
visuals: Curved orange gust line appears behind enemy
Small energy burst fades at enemy feet

dissipation.description: Vortex loses power and spirals away into fading orange sparkles.

charge.sound: Magical orange energy charge-up with rising spin

vortex_loop.sound: Deep magical cyclone roar with shimmering energy

peak.sound: High-energy tangerine shimmer layered over vortex roar

dissipation.sound: Cyclone fading into soft magical sparkles

recommended_nodes: Sprite2D or ShaderMaterial for spiral texture
ColorRect for orange screen tint and flash
godot_implementation.blend_mode: Additive for tangerine glow, Alpha blend for haze
godot_implementation.damage_logic: Apply damage to all enemies on screen every 0.2 seconds during vortex and peak phases. Apply outward knockback from player center.
godot_implementation.performance_note: Use shader-driven spiral rotation for the main vortex instead of spawning many large sprites.
